content.text: Translate, rotate, scale, and skew change an element’s painted geometry without moving its original layout box or reflowing neighbors. Transform functions apply in sequence, transform-origin sets the reference point, and individual translate, rotate, and scale properties can make composition clearer. Transforms may create stacking and containing contexts. Apply it to survey status badge transform collision.
